name: brand-constructor
description: Brand Constructor - Admin Panel + Constructor для створення брендів

scripts.deploy: turbo run build && pnpm deploy:worker:production && cd packages/admin && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name brand-constructor
scripts.deploy:constructor: pnpm build:constructor && cd packages/constructor && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name brand-constructor-app
scripts.deploy:all: turbo run build && pnpm deploy:worker:production && cd packages/admin && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name brand-constructor && cd ../constructor && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name brand-constructor-app
